experience.title: Guided by Experience, Driven by Your Success
experience.description: Navigating a new academic journey in a foreign country can be challenging. That's why K-BRIDGE's programs are guided by a network of global alumni who understand exactly what it takes to succeed in Korea.

alumni.title: Our Team of Global Alumni Experts
alumni.description: Our team comprises international alumni who have successfully navigated the Korean higher education system. Their firsthand experience translates into authentic, practical guidance for students taking their first steps in Korea.

cultural.title: Cultural & Educational Exchange
cultural.description: Beyond the classroom, we connect you to a wider world. K-BRIDGE leverages sustainable partnerships to drive meaningful cultural exchanges, making your study abroad experience global.

Hero.title: Your Gateway to Study in Korea
Hero.description: Connect with Korea's leading universities through our comprehensive educational consulting services. We provide end-to-end support for international students pursuing their academic dreams in South Korea.

aboutBridge.title: The bridge between where you are and where you're going.
aboutBridge.subtitle: K-Bridge bridges the gap between your home country and Korean academia, allowing you to simply cross over without the effort of building it yourself.

home.label: You are here
home.title: Home Country
home.description: Confused by Korean admissions, scholarships, and visa rules.

connector.label: K-BRIDGE
connector.title: The Connector
connector.description: Alumni advisors translate the system into a plan built for you.

arrive.label: You arrive here
arrive.title: Studying in Korea
arrive.description: Enrolled, supported, and ready to thrive from day one.

landingPrograms.title: Find Your Path to Korea
landingPrograms.intro: End-to-end support designed to ensure your success throughout your educational journey in Korea

language.title: Korean Language Programs
language.description: Start your journey with comprehensive Korean language programs

degree.title: Find Your Perfect Program
degree.description: Explore degree programs and courses at top Korean universities

footer.tagline: The bridge between where you are and where you're going. End-to-end consulting for international students pursuing higher education in South Korea.

newsletter.headline: Your Gateway to Study in Korea
newsletter.subheadline: Get application tips, scholarship updates, and program news delivered straight to your inbox.
